message:
feat(core): push WHERE predicates down to primary table scan in multi-table joins

When a WHERE clause only references columns from the primary (leftmost)
table in a JOIN, evaluate it early during row loading via
maybe_filter_primary_join_rows(), reducing the cross-product size before
the join loop runs. Add expr_references_only_col_map() to verify all
column references resolve within the primary table's column map.

Fix flatten_expr_option() to use explicit match instead of
map/transpose, correcting the control flow for Option<Box<Expr>>
flattening. Deduplicate inline map/transpose patterns in LIKE, CASE,
and FunctionCall arms of flatten_expr_tree by delegating to
flatten_expr_option.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
